XXXX Broadway Ave. NW, Apt 408 Property ID Number: 41-13-24-335-116 Under Article V, Section 5.07(e) of the Condominium Bylaws of the Project, and Section 108 of the Michigan Condominium Act, P.A. 1978, No. 59, as amended, unpaid assessments constitute a lien on the respective condominium units owned by the Co-Owner until paid. Liens for unpaid assessments may be foreclosed in the same manner that mortgages may be foreclosed under Michigan law, including foreclosure by advertisement and sale under Chapter 32 of the Revised Judicature Act, as amended. If the property is sold at a foreclosure sale under this Chapter, under Section 3278 the borrower will be held responsible to the person who buys the property at the foreclosure sale or to the mortgage holder for damaging the property during the redemption period. There is currently due and unpaid the sum of $3,698.05, excluding interest, costs, and attorneys= fees. The length of the redemption period is six (6) months from the date of the sale, in accordance with MCLA 600.3240; MSA 27A.3240. No suit or proceeding at law has been instituted to recover the debts secured by said lien or any part thereof. NOTICE OF FORECLOSURE BY ADVERTISEMENT. Notice is given under Section 3212 of the Revised Judicature Act of 1961, 1961 PA 236, MCL 600.3212, that the following lien will be foreclosed by a sale of the premises, or some part of them, at a public auction sale to the highest bidder for cash or cashier=s check at the place of holding the circuit court in Kent County, starting promptly at 10:00 a.m., on June 24, 2026, in the Traffic Court Room in the Kent County Courthouse on the first floor in Grand Rapids in Kent County, Michigan. The amount due on the lien may be greater on the day of the sale. Placing the highest bid at the sale does not automatically entitle the purchaser to free and clear ownership of the property. A potential purchaser is encouraged to contact the county register of deeds office or a title insurance company, either of which may charge a fee for this information.
